generated_oml:
instance HokuyoLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for high-resolution 3D point cloud acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for stereo vision depth measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance CANBusInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle data collected through CAN bus interface"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLidar
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CANBusInterface
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data for clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stereo vision depth measurements for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle data for state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance StructuredDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured data storage in SQL database for vehicle state and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthImageDataTransmitted, VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for spatial pattern recognition in point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for state estimation and trajectory tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering implementation for lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for trajectory tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data translation component serializing data, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database management for data storage and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data collection component handling real-time sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for intra-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance JetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for low-latency communication and system management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 implementation for application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for low-level control modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and control design"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User interface displaying real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, with capabilities to save data and generate reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedPathInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processing of ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation, and actuation commands externally to alleviate resource-constrained on-board ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and issuing emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data displayed in user interface"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving paths visualized for the operator"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks presented in the UI"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lead vehicle detection results from DBSCAN clustering"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed speed for ACC based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save collected data for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate actuation commands for speed control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance 3DVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time rendering of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for operator input to set desired speed and emergency braking"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoLidar, DepthCamera, CANBusInterface, VedderSpeedController, 3DVisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands such as enabling/disabling ACC, setting target speed, and emergency braking are generated by the Controlling FE and User Interface FE. These commands are serialized and translated via the Data Translation component, then processed by the Actuation FE which converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for physical actuation. Remote management of ACC is enabled through the UI, with validation occurring during data translation for correct message formatting and unit consistency."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization accuracy requirement of 100 ms for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, aligning with industry standards mandating stricter than 100 ms synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architectural design based on ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages; User Entity contains 3D Visualization and Control Panel, Digital Twin Entity handles data management and control, Physical Twin Entity manages hardware resources and automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, though Physical Twin Entity's scope deviates from the standard by including general automotive functionality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin maintains high-fidelity real-time replication through Requirement R7 (maximum network latency of 100 ms) and Requirement R8 (clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms), ensuring precise temporal alignment between physical and digital states."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-component communication uses ROS2 middleware. Inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi with unspecified transport protocol due to truncated documentation. The system must maintain network latency of at most 100 ms per requirement R7. Reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Entities are deployed across separate hardware components, with vehicle-mounted hardware handling onboard processing and external storage devices managing ego vehicle state data due to limited onboard storage capacity. Deployment is edge-based, with data storage external to the vehicle for scalability and capacity reasons. Specific cloud providers or detailed scalability mechanisms are not mentioned."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry clock synchronization standards requiring 100 ms accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications, though specific data exchange protocols and external system dependencies are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The standard defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities handle specific tasks like data transformation and user interaction, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as an example implementation for Data Collection and Device Control Entities."
]
